sessionStart.description: Load previous session summary and instincts into context

sessionEnd.description: Parse transcript, write session summary, track costs

beforeShellExecution.description: Block dangerous commands, dev servers outside tmux, embedded secrets

afterShellExecution.description: Log PR URLs after gh pr create, build completion notice

afterFileEdit.description: Log edits, warn console.log, format reminder, review reminder at 5+ edits

beforeMCPExecution.description: Log MCP tool invocations to mcp-audit.log

afterMCPExecution.description: Log MCP tool results to mcp-audit.log

beforeReadFile.description: Warn when agent reads sensitive files (.env, .key, .pem)

beforeSubmitPrompt.description: Detect secrets in prompts before sending to AI

beforeTabFileRead.description: Block Tab from reading sensitive files (hard block exit 2)

preCompact.description: Save compaction marker to session log before context is summarized

stop.description: Parse transcript, extract learnings, write cost estimate

beforeFileEdit.description: Check risk map before editing high-risk files, warn if score is high
